title: × Espostocactus mirabilis
taxonomy: × Espostocactus mirabilis is classified as a hybrid species within the Cactaceae family. It is a cross between Espostoa lanata and Pachycereus schottii. This hybrid species is known for its unique and variable characteristics, making it a fascinating subject for cactus enthusiasts. The classification of × Espostocactus mirabilis is still under review and may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further studies are necessary to fully understand the taxonomy and classification of this hybrid species.
